title: Self-serve onboarding flow
summary: Rebuilt the new-customer onboarding from a 6-step wizard into a single guided checklist. Time-to-first-value dropped from 14 days to 3.

title: Refunds API v2
summary: Led the cross-team rewrite of our refunds platform. Halved support tickets and unblocked three enterprise deals.

title: Mobile dashboard
summary: Shipped the first mobile experience for our merchant dashboard. 38% of active merchants now check in on mobile weekly.
